title: Map with Date values
description: Root `Map<string, Date>` with string keys and `Date` values. JSON serializes to an array of `[key, value]` pairs and restores via `new Map(v)`; each `Date` value becomes an ISO string on encode and is rebuilt with `new Date(...)` on decode. Binary writes a size-prefixed entry list.
notes: Map round-trips as a JSON array of [key, value] pairs, rehydrated to a Map on decode.
Date values serialize via their ISO string and restore with new Date(...).
